feed.title: Google Cloud: Assured Open Source Software
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Assured Open Source Software

entry.content:
The Assured Open Source Software free tier includes an updated list of curated binaries for the Go, Java, and Python languages.

For more information, see List of supported Java and Python packages for the Assured OSS free tier and List of supported Go packages for the Assured OSS free tier.
entry.summary: The Assured Open Source Software free tier now includes an updated list of curated binaries for Go, Java, and Python languages. This enhancement provides more options for developers using these popular programming languages.
entry.title: Change: Assured OSS free tier updated

entry.content: Assured Open Source Software (Assured OSS) now supports Go packages. For more information, see Download Go packages using direct repository access for the free tier.
entry.summary: Assured Open Source Software (Assured OSS) now supports Go packages, allowing you to download them directly. This feature simplifies the process of managing and utilizing Go open source dependencies.
entry.title: Feature: Go Packages Now Supported by Assured OSS
